name: PageTend Helper
description: Read-only PageTend stats and status tools: analytics, dashboard, Meta live, settings, signals, posts, inbox, and rolling views-per-post. Configure PAGETEND_BASE_URL or ~/.pagetend/config.json. No write/mutate calls.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check PageTend base URL config and whether the host is reachable. Call this first if connectivity is unknown.

base_url.description: Optional PageTend origin (e.g. http://localhost:3000 or your tunnel URL). Omit to use PAGETEND_BASE_URL, ~/.pagetend/config.json, or http://localhost:3000.

tools.name: analytics
tools.description: Richest aggregated stats: posts/media/inbox/automation breakdowns + live Meta engagement totals.

base_url.description: Optional PageTend origin. Omit to use configured default.

summary.description: If true (default), include a compact summary plus full data.

tools.name: dashboard
tools.description: Dashboard snapshot (calendar, queue, media, campaign, automations). Always HTTP 200 from PageTend — check fallback=true before trusting numbers.

base_url.description: Optional PageTend origin. Omit to use configured default.

summary.description: If true (default), include a compact summary plus full data.

tools.name: meta_live
tools.description: Live Meta Graph pull: page profile, recent posts, engagement totals. Partial failures appear in errors[].

base_url.description: Optional PageTend origin. Omit to use configured default.

summary.description: If true (default), include a compact summary plus full data.

base_url.description: Optional PageTend origin. Omit to use configured default.

summary.description: If true (default), include a compact summary plus full data.

tools.name: signals
tools.description: Derived product-signal analytics from inbox threads.

base_url.description: Optional PageTend origin. Omit to use configured default.

summary.description: If true (default), include a compact summary plus full data.

base_url.description: Optional PageTend origin. Omit to use configured default.

summary.description: If true (default), return count + compact sample.

base_url.description: Optional PageTend origin. Omit to use configured default.

summary.description: If true (default), return count + compact sample.

tools.name: views_per_post
tools.description: Rolling-window performance card: posts published, total views/impressions, and views per post. Default last 30 days. Uses PageTend /api/pagetend/rolling-stats.

days.description: Rolling window length in days (1–365). Default 30. Always pass an integer when possible.

base_url.description: Optional PageTend origin. Omit to use configured default.

summary.description: If true (default), include a compact card/summary plus full data.
